item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: {"status":"continue","judgment":"partially-confirmed","observation":"The Still Guest is in last-chance with the flashlight restored, but beamContact is false and bearingRadians=-0.707 remains clearly left. The previous bounded left turn did not yet align the beam.","trend":"The encounter progressed from blackout to last-chance, but repeated turning has not produced beam contact; the monster remains consistently left of center.","reasoningSummary":"Because the beam is available and the monster remains left of the player, one more bounded left turn is the best immediate alignment action. Holding the beam now would likely miss while bearing remains outside the beam.","evidence":["expedition.phase=exploring","activeEncounter.state=last-chance","activeEncounter.bearingRadians=-0.7065912239235903","activeEncounter.distance=0.38859999999999884","activeEncounter.beamContact=false","activeEncounter.beamHoldMs=0","activeEncounter.lastChanceRemainingMs=4932","flashlight.mode=steady","flashlight.intensity=1","reportStatus=failed"],"historyCallIds":["call-0005"],"nextActionProfile":"turn-left","nextHypothesis":"A further bounded left turn should reduce the remaining negative bearing and align the restored flashlight beam with The Still Guest before the last-chance window closes.","confidence":0.88,"stopReason":null}
